meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Founder's Guide: Solve Project Churn with Smart Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to implement high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to drive retention and revenue growth.
content.answer_block: Most projects fail because users never reach the 'Aha!' moment. By implementing a friction-less, data-driven onboarding flow, you guide users to core value immediately. Using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can ship a high-converting onboarding experience in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with brilliant ideas that died in the 'onboarding gap.' You spend months architecting the perfect backend, only to watch users bounce within thirty seconds because they are overwhelmed, confused, or simply bored. It is the silent killer of ARR, and it is entirely preventable.

Today, we stop the cycle of unfinished projects. We are shifting from building features to building pathways. By treating your onboarding as a high-velocity conversion funnel, you transform casual visitors into power users who justify your subscription fees. It is time to stop building in a vacuum and start building for the bottom line.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Value Metric
steps.description: Before writing code, isolate the single action that proves value. If they don't do this in the first 3 minutes, they churn.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS codebase and identify the core feature that correlates with long-term retention. Create a user journey map that leads the user directly to this feature in under 3 steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze codebase for core retention feature and draft onboarding journey'

steps.title: Scaffold the Interactive Walkthrough
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a lightweight, non-intrusive modal system that tracks user progress through the setup flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding progress component. It must be modular, state-driven, and save user progress to the database after every step.

steps.title: Implement Just-In-Time (JIT) Tooltips
steps.description: Avoid information overload. Only show instructions when the user actually navigates to the specific UI element.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JIT tooltip system that triggers on element hover. Ensure the tooltips provide context-specific guidance based on the current user session state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Inject context-aware tooltips into the dashboard using the new onboarding component'

steps.title: Automate Success Triggers
steps.description: Use Claude Code to hook into your event emitters to celebrate user milestones, reinforcing positive behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a success-trigger middleware that fires a celebratory animation when a user completes their first core task.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/middleware/successEvents.ts' --prompt 'Implement celebratory event triggers for onboarding completion'

steps.title: Data-Driven Iteration
steps.description: Connect your onboarding steps to an analytics event listener to identify exactly where users drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add event tracking to every step of the onboarding flow. Ensure data is pushed to my analytics provider with user-context metadata.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Instrument onboarding flow with analytics tracking and verify events in console'

pro_tips: Never ask for user input until you have provided at least one piece of genuine value.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure': Show 20% of your features now, hide the other 80% until the user is ready.
Implement a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through a tutorial they don't want is the fastest way to lose them.
Gamify the onboarding completion. Give users a 'Quick Start' badge or a small resource boost for finishing.
A/B test your onboarding copy. Small changes in CTA wording can increase conversion rates by over 15%.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a 24-hour test with real users, and monitor your drop-off rates in your analytics dashboard to iterate further.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your hard work go to waste by losing users at the finish line. Implement these patterns, optimize your funnel, and watch your retention numbers climb. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
